highlighted section  
the introduction of the plot is about a rich man named gatsby who is trying to win back the love of his former wife. the story follows the life of gatsby and his friends as they try to escape the past and find happiness in the present. the piece shows the contrast between the wealthy and the poor, and the corruption that exists in the society. the cost of greed and desire is shown through the tragic end of gatsby. the horror of the past is revealed through the events that lead to his downfall. the interest in the story lies in the complex relationships and the moral dilemmas faced by the characters.
